Description
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
 

  • Uses of FoodBuilder in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

    Methods in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack that return FoodBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.addFoodEffect(org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effectType, int durationInSecond, int level, boolean enableParticles, boolean ambient, boolean icon, float chanceInPercent)
    Adds a food effect (PotionEffect) with a given chance to apply.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.convertFoodTo(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack target, int amount)
    Sets the item that remains after the food is consumed.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.foodClear()
    Clears all custom food properties from the ItemStack.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.foodClearEffects()
    Clears all food effects from the item.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.foodEatTicks(float value)
    Sets the time it takes to eat the food in seconds.
    FoodBuilder
    ItemBuilder.getFoodBuilder()
    Retrieves a FoodBuilder instance for the current item stack.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.removeFoodEffect(org.bukkit.potion.PotionEffectType effectType, @Nullable Integer level)
    Removes a specific food effect.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodAnimation(String animation)
    Sets the animation displayed when consuming the food.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodCanAlwaysEat(boolean value)
    Sets whether the food can be eaten even if the player is not hungry.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodConsumeParticles(boolean value)
    Enables or disables particles shown when consuming the food.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodEffects(List<FoodBuilder.FoodPojo> value)
    Sets the list of potion effects applied when the food is consumed.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodNutrition(int value)
    Sets the nutrition value (hunger points) of the food.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodSaturation(float value)
    Sets the saturation value of the food.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setFoodSound(org.bukkit.Sound sound)
    Sets the sound played when the food is consumed.
    FoodBuilder
    FoodBuilder.setUseRemainder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack d)
    Sets the use remainder of the food (item that remains after consumption).
